paper_focus.title: Deciphering the composition-microstructure correlation in low-density FeMnAlC steels with machine learning
paper_focus.research_objective: Elucidate the correlation between the complex composition and resulting microstructure in low-density FeMnAlC austenitic steels by using machine learning to accelerate alloy design.
material_systems: Nominal composition range: 18-30 wt% Mn, 8-12 wt% Al, 0.6-1.8 wt% C
Key phases: γ austenite, κ-carbide (κ phase), α-ferrite, β-Mn, B2/DO3 intermetallics
main_process_variables: Data descriptors for machine learning (composition features)
